channel.name: 🚨-general-alerts-weekly-swing-and-day-trades  [cross-channel filtered]
channel.topic:
For day traders looking to follow how I typically trade during market hours.
I typically size up on swing trades and not day trades but I will say something to the effect of, "GO BIG" if I'm sizing up on weekly options as opportunities do arise on all timeframes

messages.content:
@Day Trades 
FACE TAT TRADE:
you guys know how much I like #GOLD 
$GLD 20JUN 295c just came in @ 3.2 average

@Day Trades 
and wouldn't you know it another face tat trade comes in.
$JPM Jan 2027 220c 
kinda spendy there though

@Day Trades 
Oh you'll love this one
Face Tat Trade:
$SCMI 20JUNE 36c @ 4.4

@Day Trades 
Ok guys $GLD face tat trade is right near my second target.
Scale out the second batch of the 
$GLD 20JUNE 295c @ 19.50 from 3.2

@Day Trades 
after the bell earnings from 
$MSFT
$META 
$HOOD
$QCOM 

there was a large face tat trade that came in today for $MSFT Jan 2027 450c LEAPS

all earnings trades are lottos but found it interesting all the same. 
there's only a 15pt expected move for $MSFT so assuming this trader hopes to be paid on the day of  a catalyst or some point in the future. 

Could also be they've sold stock and risking calls. 

Either way it sets up a good lotto such as the 415c for next week. 

*remember all lottos are risking full debit paid

@Day Trades 
o m G. 
to recap yesterday's face tat trade:
$SPY 520p for June and the market did in fact pull back from 555 to 540 from yesterday, then,  today's face tat trade order was the $MSFT calls and the market ripped showing these specific trades can not only make money on specific names but give direction market clues

@Day Trades 
have a feeling i'll regret that decision but oh well. 
saw some orders for $TSLA 330c for next week. 
Either sells or there's some news coming. 
It's not face tat trade sized but odd nonetheless

@Day Trades 
$AXTI 21AUG 70c (the wifey trade) went in the money and are now being rolled in the 90calls for same expo
